author: Claude User
text: External drop now defaults to move instead of copy, matching internal drag behavior. Ctrl key tracked globally via keydown/keyup since Tauri onDragDropEvent doesn't expose keyboard modifiers. Also fixed vitest.config.ts hardcoded path.

author: Claude User
text: Fixed with drag event polling + elementFromPoint fallback in Sidebar.svelte

author: Claude User
text: Root cause: Svelte 5 event delegation interferes with HTML5 DnD state machine. The drop event never fires because Svelte's delegated event handling breaks the browser's internal DnD bookkeeping. Workaround implemented in tauri-aefl using dragend + elementFromPoint fallback, plus document-level drag event polling for visual feedback.

author: Claude User
text: EPIC complete. All children done: data model (6iax), save dialog (6qrn), quick access menu (howc). Full workspace lifecycle: save, restore, rename, delete.

author: Claude User
text: Deferred - requires binary file write support. Text paste implemented instead.

author: Claude User
text: Created PreviewPane component. Shows on right side of file list, displays file info (name, type, size, modified, path). Toggle via Alt+P or command palette.

author: Claude User
text: Sort column and direction persisted per directory via localStorage. Restored on navigation. Max 200 entries with eviction.

author: Claude User
text: EPIC complete. Bulk rename dialog with find/replace (plain text + regex), live preview, case sensitivity toggle.

author: Claude User
text: Tab drag-and-drop reordering. Drag tabs to rearrange. Visual feedback for drag source and drop target.

author: Claude User
text: Already implemented in WorkspaceDialog component (tauri-explorer-06c). Dialog supports save, restore, rename, and delete. Accessible via command palette 'Workspaces: Manage...'.

author: Claude User
text: Added Export and Import buttons to keybindings settings. Export downloads JSON, import reads JSON and applies shortcuts.

author: Claude User
text: Workspace data model: id, name, createdAt, updatedAt, state (PersistedTabState). localStorage persistence, max 20 workspaces. CRUD operations via workspacesStore.

author: Claude User
text: Save workspace dialog with name input. Updates existing workspace if name matches. Available via command palette.

author: Claude User
text: Hidden files shown at 55% opacity, 80% on hover/selected.

author: Claude User
text: Workspace quick access: WorkspaceDialog shows list of saved workspaces. Click to restore, rename/delete actions. Tab count and last modified shown.

author: Claude User
text: Bulk rename dialog UI with live preview grid, regex support, change count. Accessible via command palette when 2+ files selected.

author: Claude User
text: EPIC partially complete. Text paste (j2l0) implemented. Image paste (1i2j) deferred - needs binary file write support.

author: Claude User
text: Paste Clipboard as Text File command. Creates pasted-TIMESTAMP.txt in current directory from clipboard text.

author: Claude User
text: When enabling dual pane, right pane auto-navigates to parent directory if it shows same path as left.

author: Claude User
text: Content search now auto-triggers with 300ms debounce as user types. Toggling case-sensitive or regex mode also re-triggers search immediately. Enter/Search button still works as manual trigger.

author: Claude User
text: EPIC complete. Recent files store tracks last 50 opened files/dirs in localStorage. QuickOpen shows recent files when empty. Command palette has Open Recent and Clear Recent Files commands.

author: Claude User
text: Enhanced conflict detection UI. When a shortcut conflicts, users now see the conflict warning with an 'Override' button that unbinds the conflicting command and assigns the shortcut. Merged to main.

author: Claude User
text: EPIC complete. All children done: hotkey config UI (oytv), conflict detection with override (lcd9). Full keybinding system: customizable shortcuts via settings, search, reset, conflict warnings.

author: Claude User
text: Preview pane toggled via Alt+P shortcut (customizable). Spacebar kept free for potential Quick Look-style overlay in future.

author: Claude User
text: Implemented placeholder icons for thumbnails. Loading state now shows a dimmed image icon SVG with a small spinner overlay instead of just a spinner. Merged to main.

author: Claude User
text: Text preview implemented in PreviewPane. Added read_text_file Tauri command (512KB limit). Supports code files (js, ts, py, rs, etc) and documents (txt, md, log, cfg, toml, ini).

author: Claude User
text: Already implemented via 'Clear Recent Files' command in command palette (recent.clearHistory)

author: Claude User
text: Added bookmark/remove bookmark to folder context menu. Shows 'Add to Bookmarks' for unbookmarked directories, 'Remove Bookmark' for bookmarked ones.

author: Claude User
text: Added Ctrl+Y and Ctrl+Shift+Z keybindings for redo. Both map to edit.redo command. Merged to main.

author: Claude User
text: Type-ahead selection: typing characters in file list jumps to first matching file. Buffer resets after 800ms.

author: Claude User
text: Already implemented as part of EPIC tauri-explorer-m0b. Settings > Keyboard Shortcuts provides full customization with search, reset, and conflict detection.

author: Claude User
text: Implemented full undo/redo system. Redo stack added to undo store - undone actions pushed to redo stack and can be re-executed. New actions clear redo history (standard behavior). Redo exposed via explorer state and command system.

author: Claude User
text: Image preview implemented in PreviewPane. Uses getThumbnailData at 512px for high-quality preview of jpg, png, gif, webp, bmp files.

author: Claude User
text: Added F5 (copy) and F6 (move) shortcuts for cross-pane file operations. Commands only active in dual-pane mode. Operates on selected files.

author: Claude User
text: EPIC complete. All children done: preview pane component (2c6b), image preview (xago), text preview with monospace font (osjq), toggle shortcut (nnda).

author: Claude User
text:
Root cause identified: CSS baseline shift with overflow:hidden in flex containers.

.match-row uses align-items: baseline. .line-content has overflow: hidden (needed for text-overflow: ellipsis), while .line-number does not. Per CSS spec, a flex item with overflow: hidden has its baseline shifted to the bottom margin edge instead of the text baseline. This misalignment pushes .line-content upward, clipping ascenders.

On hover, the parent .result-item's overflow: hidden kicks in and clips .line-number too — explaining why line numbers only clip on hover.

Fix: Change overflow: hidden to overflow: clip on .line-content. overflow: clip provides the same visual clipping for text-overflow: ellipsis but does NOT create a new block formatting context, so the text baseline is preserved correctly.

author: Claude User
text: Bookmarks now persist to ~/.config/tauri-explorer/bookmarks.json via Rust config module. Write-through to both localStorage (sync) and config file (async). Existing localStorage bookmarks migrate on first load. Added read_config_file/write_config_file/get_config_dir Rust commands, frontend API wrappers, and mock handlers.

author: Claude User
text: Ctrl+P now searches from home directory instead of just CWD. Results under CWD get +100 score boost for priority. Backend: Added optional boost_prefix param to start_streaming_search. Frontend: QuickOpen fetches home dir (cached) as search root, passes CWD as boost prefix.
